summary: A mellow, beautifully‑sounding Dead show with great vocals, though the recording is missing its opening song.
review: Both reviewers praise the performance as one of the most gentle and lovely sounding from this era, highlighting the clear vocals and airy playing. The only drawback noted is that the first track is absent from this cut, but the rest of the show is regarded as a great listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: Two positive reviews (4★ and 5★) indicate a strong musical performance; minor issue of a missing opening track keeps the rating just above average.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audio described as warm and clear with fine vocals; first song is missing from this release.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; overall impression is that the performance flows well despite the missing opening track.
